---
title: "LLM Norming Pipeline (logprob + integer-only)"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, message = TRUE, warning = TRUE)
```

## Run Controls

Set `model_slug` to a key in `MODELS` below. Run directories are named
`{model_slug}_{timestamp}` (e.g. `gpt-4.1_20260601T143022`).

```{r controls}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(tibble)
  library(httr2)
  library(purrr)
  library(jsonlite)
})

# ── Pick model for this run ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
model_slug <- "gpt-4o-mini"

MODELS <- list(
  "gpt-4.1" = list(
    provider           = "openai",
    api_model          = "gpt-4.1",
    extraction         = "logprob",
    api_key_env        = "OPENAI_API_KEY",
    responses_basename = "responses_logprob",
    temperature        = 0,
    max_tokens         = 1L
  ),
  "gpt-4o-mini" = list(
    provider           = "openai",
    api_model          = "gpt-4o-mini",
    extraction         = "logprob",
    api_key_env        = "OPENAI_API_KEY",
    responses_basename = "responses_logprob",
    temperature        = 0,
    max_tokens         = 1L
  ),
  "gpt-5.4-nano" = list(
    provider           = "openai",
    api_model          = "gpt-5.4-nano",
    extraction         = "integer",
    api_key_env        = "OPENAI_API_KEY",
    responses_basename = "responses_integer",
    temperature        = NULL,
    max_tokens         = 16L
  ),
  "claude-haiku-4-5" = list(
    provider           = "anthropic",
    api_model          = "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001",
    extraction         = "integer",
    api_key_env        = "ANTHROPIC_API_KEY",
    responses_basename = "responses_integer",
    temperature        = 0,
    max_tokens         = 16L
  )
)

model_cfg <- MODELS[[model_slug]]
if (is.null(model_cfg)) {
  stop(
    "Unknown model_slug: ", model_slug,
    ". Choose one of: ", paste(names(MODELS), collapse = ", "),
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

max_words_per_task  <- 2000L
max_active_requests <- 20L

norm_samples_path     <- "../output/core_vocab_long.csv"
instructions_rda_path <- "../../data/norming_instructions.rda"
output_root           <- "../output/runs"

# aoa (1-25): up to 20/25 tokens recoverable; model concentrates mass in practice
# prevalence_score rescaled to 1-10 to fit within top_logprobs=20
exclude_constructs <- c("lexical_decision_reaction_time",
                        "speeded_naming_reaction_time")
include_constructs <- character(0)
```

## Helpers

```{r helpers}
ensure_dir <- function(path) {
  dir.create(path, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  invisible(path)
}

read_norming_instructions <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) stop("File not found: ", path, call. = FALSE)
  env <- new.env(parent = emptyenv())
  load(path, envir = env)
  get("norming_instructions", envir = env, inherits = FALSE)
}

build_instruction_map <- function(instructions_df) {
  instructions_df |>
    transmute(
      dataset          = .data$dataset,
      construct_name   = .data$construct_name,
      scale_min        = .data$scale_min,
      scale_max        = .data$scale_max,
      instructions_llm = .data$instructions_llm
    )
}

build_tasks <- function(instruction_map, norm_samples,
                        include_constructs, exclude_constructs,
                        task_suffix) {
  tasks <- instruction_map |>
    distinct(
      .data$dataset, .data$construct_name,
      .data$scale_min, .data$scale_max
    ) |>
    filter(!(.data$construct_name %in% exclude_constructs)) |>
    mutate(dimension = .data$construct_name) |>
    filter(.data$dimension %in% norm_samples$dimension)

  if (length(include_constructs)) {
    tasks <- filter(tasks, .data$construct_name %in% include_constructs)
  }

  tasks |>
    transmute(
      task_id   = paste0(.data$construct_name, "_", task_suffix),
      dataset   = .data$dataset,
      dimension = .data$dimension,
      scale_min = .data$scale_min,
      scale_max = .data$scale_max
    )
}

build_prompts <- function(task_rows, norm_samples, instruction_map,
                          max_words) {
  bind_rows(lapply(seq_len(nrow(task_rows)), function(i) {
    task <- as.list(task_rows[i, , drop = FALSE])

    instr <- instruction_map |>
      filter(
        .data$dataset        == task$dataset,
        .data$construct_name == task$dimension
      ) |>
      pull(.data$instructions_llm) |>
      dplyr::first()

    words <- norm_samples |>
      filter(
        .data$dimension == task$dimension,
        .data$split     == "holdout"
      ) |>
      slice_head(n = max_words) |>
      select("word", "score", "split")

    crossing(
      task_rows[i, c("task_id", "dataset", "dimension",
                     "scale_min", "scale_max")],
      words
    ) |>
      mutate(instruction_text = instr)
  }))
}

empty_summary_row <- function(word, dimension, split, human_score,
                              extraction) {
  tibble(
    word           = word,
    dimension      = dimension,
    split          = split,
    human_score    = human_score,
    extraction     = extraction,
    expected       = NA_real_,
    integer_rating = NA_integer_,
    coverage       = NA_real_
  )
}

parse_integer_text <- function(raw, scale_min, scale_max) {
  raw <- trimws(raw)
  val <- suppressWarnings(as.integer(raw))
  if (!is.na(val) && val >= scale_min && val <= scale_max) return(val)

  hits <- regmatches(raw, gregexpr("[0-9]+", raw))[[1]]
  if (!length(hits)) return(NA_integer_)
  vals <- as.integer(hits)
  in_range <- vals[vals >= scale_min & vals <= scale_max]
  if (length(in_range)) return(in_range[[1]])
  NA_integer_
}

# ── OpenAI requests ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

build_openai_body <- function(model_cfg, prompt) {
  body <- list(
    model    = model_cfg$api_model,
    messages = list(list(role = "user", content = prompt))
  )
  if (!is.null(model_cfg$max_tokens)) {
    body$max_tokens <- model_cfg$max_tokens
  }
  if (!is.null(model_cfg$temperature)) {
    body$temperature <- model_cfg$temperature
  }
  body
}

build_openai_logprob_request <- function(word, instruction_text, model_cfg) {
  prompt <- paste0(instruction_text, "\n\nWord: ", word)
  body <- build_openai_body(model_cfg, prompt)
  body$logprobs     <- TRUE
  body$top_logprobs <- 20L

  request("https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions") |>
    req_auth_bearer_token(Sys.getenv(model_cfg$api_key_env)) |>
    req_body_json(body)
}

build_openai_integer_request <- function(word, instruction_text, model_cfg) {
  prompt <- paste0(instruction_text, "\n\nWord: ", word)
  body <- build_openai_body(model_cfg, prompt)

  request("https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions") |>
    req_auth_bearer_token(Sys.getenv(model_cfg$api_key_env)) |>
    req_body_json(body)
}

# ── Anthropic requests ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

build_anthropic_integer_request <- function(word, instruction_text, model_cfg) {
  prompt <- paste0(instruction_text, "\n\nWord: ", word)
  body <- list(
    model      = model_cfg$api_model,
    max_tokens = model_cfg$max_tokens,
    messages   = list(list(role = "user", content = prompt))
  )
  if (!is.null(model_cfg$temperature)) {
    body$temperature <- model_cfg$temperature
  }

  request("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages") |>
    req_headers(
      `x-api-key`         = Sys.getenv(model_cfg$api_key_env),
      `anthropic-version` = "2023-06-01"
    ) |>
    req_body_json(body)
}

build_rating_request <- function(word, instruction_text, model_cfg) {
  switch(
    model_cfg$provider,
    openai = if (identical(model_cfg$extraction, "logprob")) {
      build_openai_logprob_request(word, instruction_text, model_cfg)
    } else {
      build_openai_integer_request(word, instruction_text, model_cfg)
    },
    anthropic = build_anthropic_integer_request(word, instruction_text, model_cfg),
    stop("Unsupported provider: ", model_cfg$provider, call. = FALSE)
  )
}

# ── Response parsers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

parse_openai_logprob_response <- function(resp, word, dimension, split,
                                          human_score, scale_min, scale_max) {
  valid_tokens <- as.character(seq(scale_min, scale_max))

  body <- resp_body_json(resp)
  top  <- body$choices[[1]]$logprobs$content[[1]]$top_logprobs
  raw  <- trimws(body$choices[[1]]$message$content)

  probs_raw <- map_dfr(top, function(x) {
    tok <- trimws(x$token)
    if (tok %in% valid_tokens) {
      tibble(rating = as.integer(tok), prob = exp(x$logprob))
    }
  })

  if (nrow(probs_raw) == 0) {
    return(list(
      summary = empty_summary_row(
        word, dimension, split, human_score, "logprob"
      ) |> mutate(coverage = 0),
      distribution = tibble()
    ))
  }

  probs <- probs_raw |>
    group_by(.data$rating) |>
    summarise(prob = sum(.data$prob), .groups = "drop")

  coverage   <- sum(probs$prob)
  probs$prob <- probs$prob / coverage

  list(
    summary = tibble(
      word           = word,
      dimension      = dimension,
      split          = split,
      human_score    = human_score,
      extraction     = "logprob",
      expected       = sum(probs$rating * probs$prob),
      integer_rating = parse_integer_text(raw, scale_min, scale_max),
      coverage       = coverage
    ),
    distribution = probs |>
      mutate(word = word, dimension = dimension, .before = 1)
  )
}

parse_integer_response <- function(resp, word, dimension, split,
                                   human_score, scale_min, scale_max,
                                   provider) {
  body <- resp_body_json(resp)
  raw <- switch(
    provider,
    openai    = body$choices[[1]]$message$content,
    anthropic = body$content[[1]]$text,
    stop("Unsupported provider: ", provider, call. = FALSE)
  )

  list(
    summary = tibble(
      word           = word,
      dimension      = dimension,
      split          = split,
      human_score    = human_score,
      extraction     = "integer",
      expected       = NA_real_,
      integer_rating = parse_integer_text(raw, scale_min, scale_max),
      coverage       = NA_real_
    ),
    distribution = tibble()
  )
}

parse_rating_response <- function(resp, word, dimension, split,
                                  human_score, scale_min, scale_max,
                                  model_cfg) {
  if (identical(model_cfg$extraction, "logprob")) {
    parse_openai_logprob_response(
      resp, word, dimension, split, human_score, scale_min, scale_max
    )
  } else {
    parse_integer_response(
      resp, word, dimension, split, human_score, scale_min, scale_max,
      model_cfg$provider
    )
  }
}

write_run_meta <- function(path, run_meta) {
  writeLines(
    jsonlite::toJSON(run_meta, auto_unbox = TRUE, pretty = TRUE),
    path
  )
}
```




## Run Pipeline

```{r run-pipeline}
if (!file.exists(norm_samples_path))
  stop("Missing: ", norm_samples_path, call. = FALSE)
if (!file.exists(instructions_rda_path))
  stop("Missing: ", instructions_rda_path, call. = FALSE)

# api_key <- Sys.getenv(model_cfg$api_key_env)
# if (!nzchar(api_key)) {
#   stop(model_cfg$api_key_env, " not set.", call. = FALSE)
# }

task_suffix <- model_cfg$extraction
use_logprobs <- identical(model_cfg$extraction, "logprob")
responses_file <- paste0(model_cfg$responses_basename, ".csv")

norm_samples <- read.csv(norm_samples_path, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
instructions <- read_norming_instructions(instructions_rda_path)
instr_map    <- build_instruction_map(instructions)
task_rows    <- build_tasks(
  instr_map, norm_samples,
  include_constructs, exclude_constructs,
  task_suffix = task_suffix
)

if (!nrow(task_rows))
  stop("No tasks after filtering.", call. = FALSE)

prompts_df <- build_prompts(
  task_rows, norm_samples, instr_map, max_words_per_task
)

timestamp <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y%m%dT%H%M%S")
run_id    <- paste0(model_slug, "_", timestamp)
now_utc   <- format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", tz = "UTC")
run_dir   <- ensure_dir(file.path(output_root, run_id))
tasks_dir <- ensure_dir(file.path(run_dir, "tasks"))

run_meta <- list(
  run_id             = run_id,
  timestamp_utc      = now_utc,
  model_slug         = model_slug,
  api_model          = model_cfg$api_model,
  provider           = model_cfg$provider,
  extraction         = model_cfg$extraction,
  responses_file     = responses_file,
  max_words_per_task = max_words_per_task,
  n_prompts          = nrow(prompts_df),
  tasks              = sort(task_rows$task_id)
)
write_run_meta(file.path(run_dir, "run_meta.json"), run_meta)

message("Run ID     : ", run_id)
message("Model slug : ", model_slug)
message("API model  : ", model_cfg$api_model)
message("Extraction : ", model_cfg$extraction)
message("Tasks      : ", paste(sort(task_rows$task_id), collapse = ", "))
message("Prompts    : ", nrow(prompts_df))

tasks <- sort(unique(prompts_df$task_id))

summary_rows <- list()
dist_rows    <- list()

for (j in seq_along(tasks)) {
  tid <- tasks[[j]]
  message("\n[", j, "/", length(tasks), "] ", tid)

  task_df <- filter(prompts_df, task_id == tid)
  s_min   <- task_df$scale_min[[1]]
  s_max   <- task_df$scale_max[[1]]

  reqs <- map(seq_len(nrow(task_df)), function(i) {
    build_rating_request(
      word             = task_df$word[[i]],
      instruction_text = task_df$instruction_text[[i]],
      model_cfg        = model_cfg
    )
  })

  resps <- req_perform_parallel(
    reqs,
    on_error   = "continue",
    max_active = max_active_requests,
    progress   = paste0(tid, " [", j, "/", length(tasks), "]")
  )

  parsed <- map(seq_along(resps), function(i) {
    resp <- resps[[i]]
    if (inherits(resp, "error")) {
      return(list(
        summary = empty_summary_row(
          task_df$word[[i]], task_df$dimension[[i]],
          task_df$split[[i]], task_df$score[[i]],
          model_cfg$extraction
        ) |> mutate(coverage = if (use_logprobs) 0 else NA_real_),
        distribution = tibble()
      ))
    }
    parse_rating_response(
      resp        = resp,
      word        = task_df$word[[i]],
      dimension   = task_df$dimension[[i]],
      split       = task_df$split[[i]],
      human_score = task_df$score[[i]],
      scale_min   = s_min,
      scale_max   = s_max,
      model_cfg   = model_cfg
    )
  })

  task_summary <- bind_rows(map(parsed, "summary")) |>
    mutate(
      run_id        = run_id,
      timestamp_utc = now_utc,
      model_slug    = model_slug,
      model         = model_cfg$api_model,
      .before       = 1
    )

  task_dist <- bind_rows(map(parsed, "distribution")) |>
    mutate(
      run_id     = run_id,
      model_slug = model_slug,
      model      = model_cfg$api_model,
      .before    = 1
    )

  summary_path <- file.path(tasks_dir, paste0(tid, "_summary.csv"))
  write.csv(task_summary, summary_path, row.names = FALSE)

  if (use_logprobs) {
    dist_path <- file.path(tasks_dir, paste0(tid, "_distributions.csv"))
    write.csv(task_dist, dist_path, row.names = FALSE)
  }

  if (use_logprobs) {
    n_ok  <- sum(!is.na(task_summary$expected))
    n_na  <- sum(is.na(task_summary$expected))
    cov_m <- round(mean(task_summary$coverage, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
    message(
      "  done — ", n_ok, " expected, ", n_na,
      " failed, mean coverage = ", cov_m
    )
  } else {
    n_ok <- sum(!is.na(task_summary$integer_rating))
    n_na <- sum(is.na(task_summary$integer_rating))
    message("  done — ", n_ok, " rated, ", n_na, " failed")
  }

  summary_rows[[j]] <- task_summary
  if (use_logprobs) dist_rows[[j]] <- task_dist
}

responses_out <- bind_rows(summary_rows)
write.csv(
  responses_out,
  file.path(run_dir, responses_file),
  row.names = FALSE
)

message("\nWrote: ", file.path(run_dir, responses_file))

if (use_logprobs) {
  dists_out <- bind_rows(dist_rows)
  write.csv(
    dists_out,
    file.path(run_dir, "distributions.csv"),
    row.names = FALSE
  )
  message("Wrote: ", file.path(run_dir, "distributions.csv"))
}

message("Wrote: ", file.path(run_dir, "run_meta.json"))
message("Run complete: ", run_id)
```
